name: mm2024-foundry-builder
description: Pipeline para gerar um módulo FoundryVTT (dnd5e) com os monstros do Monster Manual 2024 a partir de um PDF local. Não redistribui conteúdo protegido: apenas processa o PDF fornecido pelo usuário no ambiente dele.

scripts.index: python3 src/parse/build_index.py "${MM_PDF:-../4. MM (2024) - AI Upscaled + HQ [5e].pdf}" > data/intermediate/book-index.json
scripts.all: npm run extract && npm run index && npm run parse && npm run reconcile && npm run translate && npm run normalize && npm run build:pack && npm run report
scripts.regen: npm run parse && npm run reconcile && npm run translate && npm run normalize && npm run build:pack && npm run report
scripts.build:5e: npm run convert:5e && npm run translate && npm run normalize && npm run build:pack && npm run report
scripts.all:5e: npm run fetch:5e && npm run build:5e
